metadata.title:
TO SHUT WOMEN


OUT OF SALOONS

pages.raw_text:
Councilman Estep's ordinance to
prevent sale of liquor to women in
saloons, and variety theaters was
introduced in the council last
evening and referred to the COM
mittee of the whole for further dis
cussion. Fred Schade, represent
ing the brewery interests, opposed
the measure on the ground that it
would establish prohibition in Spo-
kane as far as women are con-
cerned.


Counsel Hamblen holds the Or
dinance constitutional although it
makes distinction in not naming
restaurants and hotels in the list
of places forbidden to serve wom-
en- tipplers. If passed the law will
do away with the presence of wom-
en- In saloons, practice as flourish
ing now as prior to the time boxes
were ordered removed.
